assessor_1_raw: Walk-forward CV for HPO followed by full training window retraining is standard time series methodology. Hyperparameter transferability is generally robust. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Zero-volume days retained to avoid sparse-lane bias. Sparse lane stratum tracked separately. Correct methodological choices. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: 100 Optuna trials for both GNN and LightGBM ensures equivalent exploration budgets. Compute equivalence may not be exact (GNN trials are more expensive) but the trial count constraint is the correct parity mechanism. Verdict: defense_wins.
